creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
Client: FreeBSD x64 11.1-RELEASE-p3, xpra v2.0.3-r16186
Server: Xubuntu 17.04 x64, xpra v2.0.2-r15657

'xpra showconfig' output (only the bronze colored lines):

Warning: lpinfo command failed and returned 1                                                      
 command used: 'lpinfo --make-and-model Generic PDF Printer -m'                                    
Warning: lpinfo command failed and returned 1

...

lpadmin              (default) = '/usr/sbin/lpadmin'               <type 'str'>
lpinfo                (used)   = '/usr/local/sbin/lpinfo'          <type 'str'>
lpinfo               (default) = '/usr/sbin/lpinfo'                <type 'str'>
...

...

'>
...
webcam                (used)   = 'no'                              <type 'str'>
webcam               (default) = 'auto'                            <type 'str'>


Now starting xpra_launcher and connecting, there's already telegram running in the xpra connection. After some time xpra on client crashes:

xpra_launcher                                                                 i
Warning: sorry, no support for Xdummy on freebsd11
Xpra gtk2 client version 2.0.3-r16186 64-bit
 running on FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p1
Warning: sorry, no support for Xdummy on freebsd11
GStreamer version 1.12.3 for Python 2.7.14 64-bit

GStreamer version 1.12.3 for Python 2.7.14 64-bit
OpenGL_accelerate module loaded
OpenGL enabled with GeForce GTX 970/PCIe/SSE2

    monitor 1 (597x336 mm - DPI: 81x81)
keyboard layouts: us,ru,us,ru

do_send_printers()
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/xpra/client/client_base.py", line 727, in do_send_printers
    printers = get_printers()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/xpra/platform/pycups_printing.py", line 398, in get_printers
    all_printers = get_all_printers()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/xpra/platform/pycups_printing.py", line 402, in get_all_printers
    conn = cups.Connection()
RuntimeError: failed to connect to server
2017-11-12 20:08:15,546 sound output using audio codec opus
2017-11-12 20:08:15,547 sound output using container format ogg
2017-11-12 20:08:44,866 sound output stopping
zsh: segmentation fault (core dumped)  xpra_launcher


and produces 410.4 MB python2.7.core file.
What makes my setup unusual is that server has 2 monitors.

I've tried to just start xpra_launcher with gdb and I get lots of these errors: 
'Error while reading shared library symbols:    Dwarf Error: wrong version in compilation unit header (is 4, should be 2) [in module /usr/local/lib/gcc6/libgcc_s.so]'
